titleStmt.title: SII 37.9: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 9. (A.R. No. 445 of 1938-39.) Nalajanaṁpāḍu (hamlet of Rājupālem), Kanigiri Taluk, Nellore District.

summary.p: Slab lying in a field outside the village.
This undated inscription may be assigned to the 9th century A.D., on the basis of palaeography.

It registers a gift of land sowable with three Puṭṭis of āḍlu-grain by Bōdirāju son of Paḷlayaru. The chief bears the titles Parama-māhēśvara, Paramēśvara and Pallavāditya and is said to be a worshipper at the feet of Bhagavad-Arhat Parama-bhaṭṭāraka. This inscription engraved by Pallavāchārya son of Vāchchhōṭōḷa.
[Published in Nellore District Inscriptions Vol. III, No. 25, pp. 676-77.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti bha
gavadarhata pa
rama bhaṭṭāra kasya pā
dānu dhyāta parama mā
hēśvara paramēśvara pa
llavāditya śrībōdi
rājula Andupaḷla
yari koḍuku bōdirā
janvānṟu rājamānaṁ
bumūnṟu vuṭlu Āḍlu
paṭṭu kṣētraṁbu pa
si paḷlayāri
yaneṇḍu nākuIcce
dīni rakṣiIccina vāniki

Aḍugaḍuga
śvamēdhaṁbunā
phalaṁbagu
dīni ticcina
vāniki Ērēḍu
śrīparvvataṁbu
liccina pāpa
ṁbagu vāccō
ṭōḷa koḍuku
pallavācā
rjjsassalikhi
taṁ śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
